landing.heroTitle: Every tender, worldwide. One search away.
landing.heroSubtitle: We aggregate public and private procurement notices from around the world, translate and summarize them, and alert you the moment something relevant appears.
landing.searchPlaceholder: Search tenders — e.g. solar, road construction, medical supplies

search.placeholder: Search tenders — e.g. solar, road construction, medical supplies
search.resultCount: {count, plural, =0 {No tenders} one {# tender} other {# tenders}} found
search.unavailableHint: The search service is not reachable right now. Please try again in a moment.

empty.title: No tenders match your filters
empty.hint: Try removing a filter or using a broader keyword.

saveSearch.title: Save this search as an alert
saveSearch.saved: Saved! We'll email you when new tenders match.

onboarding.title: Set up your first alert in 3 minutes
onboarding.subtitle: Tell us what you're looking for — we'll watch every source for you.

hints.sectors: Pick the sectors you work in.
hints.countries: Pick the countries you can bid in.
hints.keywords: Optionally add keywords, separated by commas.

onboarding.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.signInRequired: Sign in to manage your alerts.

empty.title: No alerts yet
empty.hint: Create your first alert and we'll email you matching tenders.

dashboard.signInRequired: Sign in to see your dashboard.
dashboard.emptyFeed: No current matches for your saved search.

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.signInRequired: Sign in to see your watchlist.

empty.title: Your watchlist is empty
empty.hint: Save tenders you're interested in and track their deadlines here.

tender.summaryDisclaimer: Generated summary — always verify against the original notice.
tender.eligibilityOpen: No eligibility restrictions were extracted for this tender. Check the original notice for details.

applySteps.one: Read the original notice carefully, including all annexes.
applySteps.two: Confirm your company meets the eligibility requirements.
applySteps.three: Prepare the required documents before the question deadline.
applySteps.four: Submit questions to the buyer if anything is unclear.
applySteps.five: Submit your bid through the channel stated in the notice — before the deadline.

tender.documentsNote: Documents open on the source's website. We never host tender documents.
tender.sourceTrustNote: This notice was aggregated from the official source below. Always rely on the original for binding information.

map.title: Tenders worldwide
map.subtitle: Click a country to see its open tenders.

upgrade.searchLimitHint: The Free plan includes 10 searches per day. Upgrade for unlimited search and full archive access.
upgrade.clickLimitHint: The Free plan includes 5 original-source clicks per month. Upgrade for unlimited access.
